Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Esther Chang, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Donna Santana

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Donna Santana, As Co-Trustee Of The Elva Iacono Vergari Trust's Motion For Order That Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's Requests For Admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $350, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
